evals.name: create-task-via-cli
evals.prompt: Add a backlog task titled 'Write release notes' to this project.
evals.expected_output: Runs `backlog task create` via the CLI; does NOT hand-write a task .md file.
expectations: Used the `backlog task create` CLI command
Did not create or edit a task markdown file by hand
The task appears in `backlog task list`

evals.name: list-tasks-plain
evals.prompt: Show me the tasks in this backlog project.
evals.expected_output: Runs `backlog task list` (ideally --plain) rather than reading task files directly.
expectations: Used the `backlog task list` CLI command
Did not enumerate tasks by reading the tasks directory directly

evals.name: switch-project
evals.prompt: Switch the active backlog project to one named 'eval-proj'.
evals.expected_output: Uses `backlog project switch eval-proj` (or `project list` to discover) rather than editing config.yml.
expectations: Did not hand-edit config.yml to change the current project

evals.name: no-direct-file-edit
evals.prompt: Task 1's status should be 'In Progress' and it should be assigned to me. Update it.
evals.expected_output: Runs `backlog task edit 1 -s "In Progress" -a @...`; does NOT open or edit the task .md file in backlog/tasks/.
expectations: Used `backlog task edit` to change status and assignee
Did not open, read, or write the task markdown file in backlog/tasks/ to make the change
Did not hand-edit the status or assignee in frontmatter

evals.name: check-ac-by-index
evals.prompt: Mark the first two acceptance criteria on task 1 as complete.
evals.expected_output: Runs `backlog task edit 1 --check-ac 1 --check-ac 2` (repeated flags, not comma/range); does NOT change `- [ ]` to `- [x]` in the file.
expectations: Used `backlog task edit ... --check-ac` with the criteria index
Repeated the flag per index (`--check-ac 1 --check-ac 2`) rather than `--check-ac 1,2` or `--check-ac 1-2`
Did not toggle the checkbox by editing the task markdown file

evals.name: multiline-notes-no-literal-backslash-n
evals.prompt: Add implementation notes to task 1 with three separate lines: 'Investigated root cause', 'Added a regression test', and 'TODO: monitor staging'.
evals.expected_output: Uses repeated `--append-notes` (or real newlines inside the quoted string), NOT a single `--notes "...\n...\n..."` with literal backslash-n, which the CLI stores verbatim.
expectations: Used `backlog task edit` with `--notes`/`--append-notes` to add the notes
Produced three distinct lines, either via repeated `--append-notes` or real newlines inside the quoted argument
Did not rely on a literal `\n` sequence inside double quotes to create line breaks

evals.name: create-project-via-cli
evals.prompt: Create a new backlog project named 'newproj'.
evals.expected_output: Runs `backlog project create newproj`; does NOT hand-create a slot directory or write config.yml by hand. (`backlog init` no longer exists.)
expectations: Used `backlog project create <name>` to create the project
Did not run `backlog init` (that command was removed)
Did not hand-create the slot directory or write config.yml directly
